name: openEuler sig-DDE SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-DDE SIG maintains 82 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-DDE SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The deepin desktop enviroment sig.. The SIG has 9 core members and maintains 82 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-DDE SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-DDE SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-DDE SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-DDE SIG maintains 82 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-DDE.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-DDE SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-DDE SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: mahailiang, lvgenggeng, yangxiaoxuan. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
